hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
tool_input = d.get('tool_input') or {}
p = tool_input.get('file_path') or d.get('file_path', '')
SENSITIVE = re.compile(r'(src/auto_research/(extract/(guardrails|schemas|citation)|backtest/(cpcv|deflated_sharpe|labels|costs)|agents/(research_graph|reliability)|mcp_server\.py)|^feast/|/feast/)')
if SENSITIVE.search(p):
    print('\n\033[33m\u26a0\ufe0f  SENSITIVE PATH \u2014 check AGENTS.md \u00a72 invariant + \u00a73, name a failing test or eval gate before finalising.\033[0m')
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
result = json.dumps(d.get('tool_response', ''))
if any(x in result for x in ['FAILED', 'ERROR', 'AssertionError', 'Traceback']):
    print('\n\033[31m\u2717 Build/test failure detected \u2014 stop and root-cause before next edit. Do not paper over with try/except or skip markers.\033[0m')
"
